mission:
The spec is ready. Here's a summary of what it covers:

**GOAL.md Integration Spec** -- Adapts the [

tasks.title: Worker prompt integration for GOAL.md fitness
Final integration review after all 7 spec areas complete
Fix AD_RESULT emission in swarm worker prompt

stagnation.pivot: Reduce parallelism. Focus agents on fewer, higher-impact tasks.
More than half of tasks are failing. Spawn a research agent to diagnose the syst

discoveries: [goal-core-impl] (report) goal.py module complete: GoalSpec/FitnessResult/IterationEntry dataclasses, parse_goal_file, run_fitness (with component weighted composite), IterationLog (JSON-backed), check_stopping, rank_actions, render_score_summary. 25 tests covering all specified cases. Full verification passes.

[goal-md-researcher] (report) Research on jmilinovich/goal-md complete. Key findings: (1) GOAL.md has 11 required sections. (2) Fitness functions output JSON with score/max keys, use check() helper for pass/partial/fail. (3) iterations.jsonl is append-only JSONL with before/after/action/result/note. (4) Three operating modes: converge, continuous, supervised. (5) Three metric mutability modes: locked, split, open. (6) Revert is git-based with atomic commits. (7) Action catalog ranked by estimated point impact with gotchas. (8) Dual-score pattern separates instrument quality from outcome quality.

[workspace-verifier] (report) WORKSPACE VERIFICATION COMPLETE. Findings: (1) goal.py: 465 lines, real implementation -- parser, fitness runner, IterationLog, check_stopping, rank_actions, render_score_summary. All present and functional. (2) test_goal.py: 25 tests, all pass. (3) config.py: GoalConfig dataclass is COMPLETE and clean -- not broken. Has GoalConfig class, _build_goal() parser, auto_detect logic in load_config(), goal field on MissionConfig. (4) test_goal_config.py: 5 tests, all pass. (5) Full suite: 3080 passed, ruff clean, bandit clean. (6) Committed all 4 files as 268e624. Workspace is clean for downstream agents.

[tui-fitness-panel] (report) Added _build_goal_panel() and _score_color() to tui.py. Panel shows composite score, per-component bars with color coding, sparkline trend, and timestamp. Conditionally integrated into sidebar layout (splits into goal+signals when active, just signals when no goal data). 26 new tests all passing. Full suite: 3106 passed, ruff clean, bandit clean.

[swarm-goal-integrator] (report) Integrated GOAL.md fitness scoring into all 5 swarm files. Added 4 new fields to SwarmState, goal evaluation in ContextSynthesizer, goal-aware system prompt addendum, score delta injection per cycle, goal_met stopping condition in planner, and goal fitness summary in completion report. 31 new tests in test_swarm_goal.py, plus fixed 4 existing tests. All 3165 tests passing, ruff clean, bandit clean.

[mission-goal-integrator] (report) Mission mode goal integration complete: (1) continuous_controller.py: _init_goal_tracking auto-detects GOAL.md, _measure_fitness runs before/after each epoch, auto-reverts on regression via green_branch._rollback_merge, goal_met stopping condition in _should_stop, fitness scores written to MISSION_STATE.md changelog. (2) deliberative_planner.py: new goal_context parameter injected into planner's project context with score summary, trend, constraints, and prioritization instructions. (3) worker.py: goal_context passed to render_mission_worker_prompt with fitness command, current score, constraints, and action catalog. (4) planner_context.py: Goal Fitness section in MISSION_STATE.md from state_changelog entries. (5) 28 new tests covering init, measurement, regression detection, stopping, worker prompts, and context building.

[cli-goal-flag] (report) CLI goal integration complete: (1) --goal flag added to both swarm and mission subcommands in build_parser(). (2) goal-status subcommand added with --goal, --config, --timeout flags. (3) cmd_goal_status() displays composite score, per-component scores with bars, target, progress percentage, and stopping status. (4) _resolve_goal_path() helper handles explicit path, config-based, and auto-detection. (5) cmd_mission/cmd_swarm wire --goal into config.goal.enabled and config.goal.goal_file. (6) 20 new tests covering arg parsing, path resolution, goal-status output, error cases, and config wiring. Full suite: 3212 passed, ruff clean, bandit clean.

[workspace-state-verifier] (report) WORKSPACE VERIFICATION COMPLETE. All 6 areas PRESENT and WORKING. 3212 tests pass, ruff clean, bandit clean. Worker prompt + CLI --goal already done. Workspace ready for final review.

[workspace-consistency-check] (report) WORKSPACE CONSISTENCY REPORT -- GOAL.md Integration

== RECOMMENDATION ==
Workspace is READY. All 6 agents' work is present, all 3212 tests pass, lint and security are clean. The uncommitted changes (14 modified files + 5 new test files) should be committed. No conflicts detected between agent outputs.

[head-verification-reviewer] (report) HEAD verification complete. All 3212 tests pass, ruff clean, bandit clean. All goal-related files verified: goal.py (parse_goal_file, GoalSpec, FitnessResult, run_fitness, check_stopping, IterationLog all importable), config.py (GoalConfig dataclass present), swarm/context.py (goal fitness evaluation integrated), swarm/planner.py (goal-based stopping + fitness delta injection), swarm/tui.py (FitnessPanel/goal panel built), cli.py (--goal flag + goal-status subcommand), continuous_controller.py (full goal tracking with iteration log, regression detection, revert support), deliberative_planner.py (goal context injection). Note: task spec referenced parse_goal_md but the actual function is parse_goal_file. No conflicts detected between agent commits.
